NIGHTMOON-NUN_PEEK_FUTURE.title: Peek Future
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PEEK_FUTURE.description:
Draw {Draw:diff()} card.
Advance your current Prayers by {Advance:diff()} turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PIETY.title: Piety
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PIETY.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} Block.
Advance your current Prayers by {Advance:diff()} turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRACTICE.title: Practice
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAISE.title: Praise
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PRAISE.description:

NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_STRIKE.title: Holy Strike
NIGHTMOON-NUN_GAZE.title: Gaze
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SILENT_PRAYER.title: Silent Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SILENT_PRAYER.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} Block.
If you have a Prayer waiting, draw 1 card.

NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANGRY_PRAYER.title: Angry Prayer

NIGHTMOON-NUN_THORN_STRIKE.title: Thorn Strike
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_RECORD.title: Confession Record
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_RECORD.descript: At the start of your turn, lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP and gain {NunConfessionRecordPower:diff()} Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_SHIELD.title: Holy Shield
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RESONANCE.title: Resonance
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MAGIC.title: Magic
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MAGIC.description:
Draw {Draw:diff()} cards.
Advance your current Prayers by {Advance:diff()} turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_PRAYER.title: Mana Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SWIFT_PRAYER.title: Swift Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_HAUNT.title: Haunting Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LIFE_PRAYER.title: Life Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_WEAK_RAY.title: Weak Ray
NIGHTMOON-NUN_WEAK_RAY.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} Weak to ALL enemies.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DAWN.title: Dawn
NIGHTMOON-NUN_BLADE_SHIELD.title: Blade and Shield
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LIFE_DRAIN.title: Life Drain
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SACRED_STRIKE.title: Sacred Strike
NIGHTMOON-NUN_JUDGEMENT.title: Judgement
NIGHTMOON-NUN_JUSTICE_SCALE.title: Scales of Justice
NIGHTMOON-NUN_JUSTICE_SCALE.description: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to {NunJusticeScalePower:diff()}% of the total damage you dealt this combat to a random enemy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FORWARD_RETREAT.title: Forward Retreat
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FORWARD_RETREAT.descriptio:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {DrawPerPrayer:diff()} card for each Prayer waiting.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_POSSESSED.title: Possessed
NIGHTMOON-NUN_BOMB.title: Bomb
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REBUKE.title: Rebuke
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REBUKE.description: Deal damage equal to the total number of Prayer cards in your draw pile, discard pile, hand, and exhaust pile.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_PURIFICATION.title: Holy Purification
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_PURIFICATION.descript:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If target is below {Threshold:diff()}% HP, deal {Multiplier:diff()}x damage.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LINKED_CASTING.title: Linked Casting
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LINKED_CASTING.description: The next {NunLinkedCastingPower:diff()} times you play a Skill, draw {Draw:diff()} card.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_NATURE_MARK.title: Nature Mark
NIGHTMOON-NUN_LIFE_CHARM.title: Life Charm
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_IMAGE.title: Holy Image
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_IMAGE.description: Whenever your Prayers advance, gain {NunHolyImagePower:diff()} Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PROTECTION.title: Divine Protection
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PROTECTION.descript:
Exhaust.
Gain {BufferPower:diff()} Buffer.
Advance your current Prayers by {Advance:diff()} turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RETALIATION.title: Retaliation
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RETALIATION.description:
Exhaust.
Deal damage to ALL enemies equal to HP you have lost, up to {Cap:diff()} ({CurrentDamage}).
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_CALAMITY.title: Doom Calamity
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_CALAMITY.description: At the end of your turn, advance your current Prayers by {Advance:diff()} turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ENCIRCLING.title: Encircling
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ENCIRCLING.description: At the end of your turn, gain {NunEncirclingPower:diff()} Block for each Prayer waiting.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHIELD_PRAYER.title: Shield Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHIELD_PRAYER.prayerChoice: Prayer {ChoiceDelay}: At the start of your next {ChoiceDuration} turn(s), gain 7 Block.
Prayer {ChoiceDelay}: At the start of your next {ChoiceDuration} turn(s), gain 7 Block.

NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANGEL_SHIELD.title: Angel Shield
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ANGEL_SHIELD.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} Block.
Shuffle a copy of this card into your draw pile.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_TWISTED_FUTURE.title: Twisted Future
NIGHTMOON-NUN_TWISTED_FUTURE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If Confession is greater than {ConfessionThreshold:diff()}, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} additional damage.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REPENT_PRAYER.title: Repent Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REPENT_PRAYER.description: Prayer 3: Gain {NunConfessionPower:diff()} Confession and immediately trigger Confession once.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REDEMPTION.title: Redemption
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REDEMPTION.description:
Exhaust.
Target loses HP equal to your Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_STUDY.title: Study
NIGHTMOON-NUN_STUDY.description:
Draw {Draw:diff()} card.
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If all cards in hand have different types, repeat both effects.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SACRIFICE.title: Sacrifice
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SACRIFICE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If this kills the enemy, gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MOURNING.title: Mourning
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MOURNING.description:
Multiply all waiting Prayer values by {Multiplier:diff()}.
They take {Delay:diff()} additional turns.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MIRROR.title: Mirror
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MIRROR.description:
Create a copy of the leftmost card in your hand.{IfUpgraded:
That copy costs 0 this turn.|}
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_ROBE.title: Confession Robe
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CONFESSION_ROBE.descriptio:
Exhaust.
Gain Block equal to your Confession.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PENANCE.title: Penance
NIGHTMOON-NUN_ABYSS.title: Abyss
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HAND_OF_GOD.title: Hand of God
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HAND_OF_GOD.description:
Exhaust.
Target loses {Percent:diff()}% of its current HP, up to {Cap:diff()}.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SETTLEMENT_TIME.title: Settlement Time
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SETTLEMENT_TIME.descriptio:
Exhaust.
Deal {Percent:diff()}% of damage dealt last turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SPIRIT_STORM.title: Spirit Storm
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SPIRIT_STORM.description:
Exhaust.
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Stun enemies below {Threshold:diff()}% HP.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_WATER_BATH.title: Holy Water Bath
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_WATER_BATH.descriptio: Exhaust Curses in your draw pile, discard pile, and hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_INSPIRATION_BURST.title: Inspiration Burst
NIGHTMOON-NUN_INSPIRATION_BURST.descript:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} Block.
Choose {Pick:diff()} of {Choices:diff()} random Skill cards from your draw pile and put it into your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PROPHECY.title: Prophecy
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PROPHECY.description: Look at the top {Look:diff()} cards of your draw pile. Choose {Choose:diff()} to put into your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_PROPHECY.selectionScreenPr: Choose cards to put into your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MEMORY.title: Memory
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MEMORY.description: Choose {Choose:diff()} card from your exhaust pile. Add a copy to your hand.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CRYSTAL_BALL.title: Crystal Ball
NIGHTMOON-NUN_CRYSTAL_BALL.description: Play the top card of your draw pile.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DREAM.title: Dream
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DREAM.description: Add {Create:diff()} random Prayer card to your hand. It costs 0 this turn and has Exhaust.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_SURGE.title: Mana Surge
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MANA_SURGE.description:
At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
Your Prayers take {NunManaSurgePower:diff()} additional turns.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHORTCUT.title: Shortcut
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHORTCUT.description: The next {NunShortcutPower:diff()} Prayer cards you play take {Reduction:diff()} fewer turns.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FOG.title: Fog
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FOG.description:
Exhaust.
The next {NunFogPower:diff()} times you lose HP, lose half as much.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEMON_BLADE.title: Demon Blade
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEMON_BLADE.description: At the start of your turn, deal damage to a random enemy equal to total floors climbed divided by {Divisor:diff()}.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_AREA.title: Holy Area
NIGHTMOON-NUN_HOLY_AREA.description: Whenever a Prayer resolves, gain {NunHolyAreaPower:diff()} Block.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REBIRTH_PRAYER.title: Rebirth Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_REBIRTH_PRAYER.description: Prayer 2: Add {Create:diff()} random Prayer cards to your Prayer zone.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DEVOUR_PRAYER.title: Devour Prayer
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_SCEPTER.title: Divine Scepter
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_SCEPTER.description:
Exhaust.
Add copies of all Prayer cards in your deck to your Prayer zone at maximum Prayer tier.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PUNISHMENT.title: Divine Punishment
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PUNISHMENT.descript: Prayer {PrayerTurns:diff()}: Choose an Attack card from your draw pile or discard pile and autoplay it {PlayCount:diff()} times.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DIVINE_PUNISHMENT.selectio: Choose an Attack card from your draw pile or discard pile.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_GOSPEL.title: Gospel
NIGHTMOON-NUN_GOSPEL.description:
Advance your current Prayers by {Advance:diff()} turns.
Add copies of Prayers completed this way to your hand. Those copies cost 0 this turn and have Exhaust.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_RADIANT_FORM.title: Radiant Form
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MIND_BLOOM.title: Mind Bloom
NIGHTMOON-NUN_MIND_BLOOM.description: Your Prayer cards are played an additional time.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FINAL_HOPE.title: Final Hope
NIGHTMOON-NUN_FINAL_HOPE.description:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Retain your hand.
Take an extra turn.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_KARMA_STAIN.title: Karma Stain
NIGHTMOON-NUN_KARMA_STAIN.description: At the end of your turn, trigger Confession {NunKarmaStainPower:diff()} additional times, then reduce Confession by {NunKarmaStainPower:diff()} more.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_DOOM_PRAYER.normalDescript: Prayer 1/2/3: Apply 2 Weak / 2 Weak and 1 Vulnerable / 2 Weak and 2 Vulnerable.
NIGHTMOON-NUN_SHIELD_PRAYER.normalDescri: Prayer {Delay1}/{Delay2}/{Delay3}: At the start of your next {Duration1}/{Duration2}/{Duration3} turn(s), gain 7 Block.
